title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Archon is an AI coding workflow orchestrator that integrates with GitHub, Slack, Telegram, Discord, and Jira. The video demonstrates building a live Jira adapter where incoming tickets trigger automated bug fixing with pull request generation and status updates.
